context: Verify that the agent correctly identifies and tags all untagged code fences with appropriate language identifiers without altering any other content.

checklist.name: All six code blocks have a language tag
checklist.description: Every fenced code block in the output file starts with a language identifier. No bare triple-backtick fences remain.

checklist.name: Language tags are accurate for each block's content
checklist.description: Shell scripts are tagged `bash`, SQL queries are tagged `sql`, TOML config is tagged `toml`, and YAML config is tagged `yaml`. No wrong or generic tags (e.g., `text`) are used where a specific tag is correct.

checklist.name: No other content changes made
checklist.description: The document structure, headings, prose, and code content are identical to the input. Only the fence opening lines differ.

checklist.name: No markdownlint suppressions added
checklist.description: The output contains no markdownlint disable comments of any kind.
